title: Nutty Light Portuguese Beans Stir-fry
description: A light and nostalgic twist on traditional Portuguese beans, featuring baby new potatoes as a protein-friendly side dish.
instructions: Peel the baby new potatoes and cut them into halves. Toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper in a roasting pan.
In a separate pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic slices and diced red peppers; stir for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add green beans to the pan, tossing well to coat them evenly in the oil mixture. Cook for about 5 minutes or until slightly softened but still firm.
Place the potato halves on top of the bean mixture, cut-side down. Roast in the oven for approximately 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and tender.
Once done, remove from heat, stir through thyme leaves, and serve with pecorino cheese cubes if using.
